1: Moreover Job continued his parable, and said,
2: As in in the days when when God preserved me;
3: And when And when by his light I walked through through darkness;
4: When the secret of God was was upon my tabernacle;
5: When When my children were were about me;
6: And the rock poured me out rivers of oil;
7: When When I prepared my seat in the street!
8: And the aged arose, and and stood up.
9: And laid their their hand on their mouth.
10: And their tongue cleaved to the roof of their mouth.
11: And when the eye saw me me , it gave witness to me:
12: And the fatherless, and him that had him that had none to help him.
13: And I caused the widow's heart to sing for joy.
14: My judgment was was as a robe and a diadem.
15: And feet was was I to the lame.
16: And the cause which which I knew not I searched out.
17: And plucked the spoil out of his teeth.
18: And I shall multiply my my days as the sand.
19: And the dew lay all night upon my branch.
20: And my bow was renewed in my hand.
21: And kept silence at my counsel.
22: And my speech dropped upon them.
23: And they opened their mouth wide as as for the latter rain.
24: And the light of my countenance they cast not down.
25: As one that that comforteth the mourners.
